evals.prompt: Audit all local Claude Code skills, fix measurable SKILL.md issues, validate, and commit the changes
evals.expected_output: The skill should run a corpus audit, produce JSON and Markdown reports, repair findings, validate, and commit scoped skill changes.
expectations: Creates or inspects skill-audit-report.json and skill-audit-report.md

evals.prompt: Review this pull request for merge readiness
evals.expected_output: The skill should not activate because PR review belongs to a code review or PR review skill.
expectations: Does not treat application PR review as a skill corpus audit
